violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee * did not wash hands as necessary. - During inspection, employee observed walking out of the store with gloves on and returned to work without washing hands. Both handwashing sinks were dry at the beginning of the inspection.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface * was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Fan under counter by sink dirty and requires a more frequent cleaning.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. - Vent filters dirty, require more frequent cleaning.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
Cooking and reheating to the proper time and temperature (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
